---
layout: post
date: 2023-03-27
inline: false
title: Congratulations, Sara Flano!
---

Sara Flano successfully defended her Biology Honors Thesis, *"Defining the cis-regulatory sequence elements regulated by BAF complexes containing different ARID1 variants."* She earned "Highest Honors" from her committee, and is the first undergraduate in the lab to defend an honors thesis. Thank you for blazing such an exemplary trail. Great job, Sara!
